testcase.name: runScenario["Search experience for product search in both home page and offers page", "Optional[Search and place the order for]"](1)

You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.26.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.26.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Search experience for product search in both home page and offers page", "Optional[Search and place the order for Products]"](2)
runScenario["Search experience for product search in both home page and offers page", "Optional[Search and place the order for]"](3)
